classroomDesc: Live device visibility, secure onboarding and controlled file dispatch.
studentsHint: Pick a device to open stream and actions.
thumbnailsModalDesc: Thumbnail grid for quick overview of all connected devices.
studentsDesc: Search, inspect and select delivery targets.
streamDesc: Current feed from the selected device.
focusedHint: Displays the live screen of the selected device.
selectStudentStream: Select a device to open stream
pairingHint: One-time code for onboarding a new device.
remoteViewDesc: Full-screen Focused view for the selected device.
remoteViewPrepHint: Next step: remote control will be added here. Full-screen monitoring is available now.
remoteViewNoFrame: No fresh frame available for the selected device
remoteControlInputHint: Click the screen to focus. Mouse and keyboard input are enabled.
remoteControlRequestHint: Send an access request first and wait for student approval on the endpoint computer.
sendFilesModalDesc: Choose a file and dispatch it to all online or selected devices.
alertsAuditDesc: Events, detector alerts and operator actions.
logsHint: Recent events, alerts and transfer status.
chatsDesc: Per-device chat with the selected student endpoint and notifications for new messages.
detectionDesc: Live events, filters, and runtime policy controls.
detectionPolicyHint: Tune sensitivity and collection behavior to reduce false positives and avoid network overload.
detectionMetadataThresholdHint: Lower means more metadata-triggered alerts, higher means stricter filtering.
detectionMlThresholdHint: Threshold for ONNX model output (when model is enabled). Higher = stricter alerts.
detectionCooldownSecondsHint: Minimum pause between duplicate alerts for the same device.
detectionSampleRateHint: Share of changed frames saved to dataset when collection mode is enabled.
detectionCollectionIntervalHint: Minimum delay between saved dataset samples.
detectionCollectionRetentionHint: Older samples are deleted automatically after this period.
detectionImmediateExportHint: To retrieve data immediately, request export from selected/online endpoints.
detectionNoEvents: No AI detection events for the selected filters.
settingsAiWarningsHint: If disabled, AI events stay in logs but will not appear as pop-up warnings.
settingsSoundEnabledHint: Play sound for hand raise and AI alert events.
settingsTtsProxyDesc: Token is stored locally on the teacher console and used by Teacher.Server to call the self-host TTS service.
settingsTtsProxyTokenHint: Students do not need this token: the server synthesizes audio and sends ready WAV to the student endpoint.
settingsAboutDesc: Dataset collection is disabled, detection parameters are fixed, and warning controls are in settings.
settingsAboutItem1: AI and hand raise events are shown as top toast notifications.
settingsAboutItem2: Notifications are also sent to Windows shell.
settingsAboutItem3: Notification volume is configured locally on the teacher console.
